description: Full audit remediation for the Pike Language Server. 34 findings split into Ralph-sized stories: critical bugs, high-priority fixes, medium-priority fixes, docs corrections, test integrity, TigerStyle splits, and architectural improvements.

userStories.title: Fix extractInitializerType returning function name as assignedType
userStories.description: As a developer, I want extractInitializerType to not assign the callee function name as assignedType. Dog d = makeDog() currently sets assignedType to 'makeDog' (wrong) instead of leaving it unset.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/symbolTable.ts extractInitializerType(), when the drilled inner node is a call expression (postfix_expr with >1 children), do NOT return the callee name as the type
Only return an identifier name if the value is a direct identifier reference (not a call)
Add a test in tests/lsp/edge-cases.test.ts: parse 'class Dog {} Dog d = makeDog();' and verify the declaration's assignedType is undefined (not 'makeDog')
All existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix PikeWorker requestCount never resetting after forced restart
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PikeWorker's requestCount to reset after a forced restart, so the worker doesn't restart on every subsequent request.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/pikeWorker.ts restart() method, add this.requestCount = 0 after the successful ping
All existing worker tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace PikeWorker queue Array.shift with index-based deque
userStories.description: As a developer, I want O(1) dequeue in PikeWorker's request queue instead of O(n) Array.shift().
acceptanceCriteria: Add a private headIdx field to PikeWorker class initialized to 0
In drainQueue(), replace this.queue.shift() with: const item = this.queue[this.headIdx++]; if (this.headIdx >= this.queue.length) { this.queue = []; this.headIdx = 0; }
In enqueue(), reset headIdx to 0 when pushing to a fresh queue if needed
All existing worker tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Encode file URIs in backgroundIndex for paths with spaces
userStories.description: As a developer, I want background indexing to produce valid file URIs even when paths contain spaces or special characters.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/backgroundIndex.ts, replace template literal `file://${filepath}` with encodeURI(`file://${filepath}`) or use path-to-uri conversion
Add a test in tests/lsp/backgroundIndex.test.ts: create temp dir with space in name, verify returned URIs contain %20
Existing backgroundIndex tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Convert moduleResolver detectPikePaths from execSync to async
userStories.description: As a developer, I want detectPikePaths to not block the event loop during LSP startup. Currently uses execSync.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/moduleResolver.ts, convert detectPikePaths to async using child_process.execFile instead of execSync
Update WorkspaceIndex constructor or initialization to await detectPikePaths
All callers that use pikePaths updated to handle the async init
Existing moduleResolver tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Convert moduleResolver findModuleInPath sync calls to async
userStories.description: As a developer, I want findModuleInPath to use async fs calls instead of blocking existsSync/statSync.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/moduleResolver.ts findModuleInPath, replace existsSync with fs.promises.access and statSync with fs.promises.stat
Make findModuleInPath and all resolve* methods async
Update all callers in completion.ts, definition handlers, etc. to await
Existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix declForHover extracting trailing semicolons and comments
userStories.description: As a Pike developer using hover, I want clean signatures without trailing semicolons, braces, or inline comments.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/server.ts declForHover(), replace source.split('\n')[decl.range.start.line] with text extraction from the tree-sitter declaration node's range
Trim trailing semicolons, opening braces, and inline comments from the extracted text
Add a test: hover over 'int x = 5; // comment' returns signature 'int x = 5' not 'int x = 5; // comment'
Existing hover tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extract shared scope-stripping utility from server.ts and completion.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single scope-stripping function that handles nested scope() calls, shared between server.ts and completion.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/src/util/stripScope.ts with a function stripScopeWrapper(sig: string): string that recursively strips scope(0, ...) and scope(1, ...) wrappers
Replace renderPredefSignature usage in server/src/server.ts with the shared utility
Replace cleanPredefSignature usage in server/src/features/completion.ts with the shared utility
Add tests for: simple scope(), nested scope(0, scope(1, ...)), no scope wrapper, scope with complex inner types
Existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Distinguish dot vs arrow member access in completion
userStories.description: As a Pike developer, I want '.' to show only public members and '->' to show all members. Currently completeMemberAccess ignores the accessType parameter.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/completion.ts completeMemberAccess(), rename _accessType to accessType and use it
For '.' (dot) access, filter declarations to exclude those with 'private' or 'protected' in their name or metadata
For '->' (arrow) access, show all declarations
Add 2 tests: one for dot filtering private members, one for arrow showing all
Existing completion tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix typeResolver synthetic Declaration ID collisions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want synthetic declarations to have unique IDs so declById lookups don't collide. Currently all use id: -1.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/typeResolver.ts, add a module-level let nextSyntheticId = -1 counter
In resolveQualifiedType, use nextSyntheticId-- for each new synthetic Declaration
Remove the unused containsDecl function
Existing type resolution tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix signatureHelp cursor position validation for argument list
userStories.description: As a developer, I want findEnclosingCall to verify the cursor is actually inside the argument list parentheses, not just inside the call expression.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/signatureHelp.ts findEnclosingCall(), after finding the opening '(' child, find the matching ')' and verify position is between them
For chained calls like a.b().c(), walk to the innermost call that contains the cursor position
Add 2 tests: cursor before '(' returns null, cursor between '(' and ')' returns the call
Existing signature help tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix signatureHelp splitParams for nested function type signatures
userStories.description: As a developer, I want splitParams to handle Pike function type signatures like function(int, string: void) as a single parameter.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/signatureHelp.ts splitParams(), track paren depth — only split commas at depth 0
Track both () and {} nesting for Pike type syntax
Add 2 tests: function(int, string: void) as single param, mixed params with nested function types
Existing signature help tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix accessResolver chained access and accept pre-parsed tree
userStories.description: As a developer, I want chained access a.b.c to resolve correctly and accessResolver to accept a pre-parsed tree.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/accessResolver.ts, add optional tree parameter to resolveAccessCore
Fix LHS extraction for chained access: recursively unwrap nested postfix_expr nodes
Update callers in server.ts to pass their already-parsed tree
Add tests for a.b.c, a->b->c resolution
Existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix workspaceIndex hash sign issue and cross-file false positives
userStories.description: As a developer, I want hashContent to produce positive hex strings and getCrossFileReferences to not match unrelated same-name symbols.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/workspaceIndex.ts hashContent(), replace & 0xffffffff with >>> 0 to ensure unsigned result
In getCrossFileReferences, add source-file filtering to prevent matching same-name symbols from unrelated files
Add a test: two files with unrelated 'process' symbols don't match as cross-file references
Existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix PikeWorker restart health check race condition
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PikeWorker restart to use a retry loop instead of a fixed 100ms sleep, so recovery is reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/pikeWorker.ts restart(), replace setTimeout(100) with a loop of up to 3 ping attempts with 100ms, 200ms, 300ms delays
If all attempts fail, log an error and surface via connection.window.showErrorMessage if available
Existing worker tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix rename reserved pattern and protected name validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want rename to reject uppercase __FOO__ patterns and check protected names at validation time.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/rename.ts, change regex /^__[a-z].*__$/ to /^__[a-zA-Z].*__$/
Move protectedNames check from getRenameLocations into validateRenameName
Add 2 tests: __FOO__ is rejected, stdlib name is rejected at validation
Existing rename tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix parser cache LRU recency update
userStories.description: As a developer, I want getCachedTree to update LRU recency on access so frequently-used trees aren't prematurely evicted.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/parser.ts getCachedTree(), replace raw map.get with the LRU cache's get method that updates recency
Add a test: fill cache to capacity, access oldest entry, add new entry, verify oldest is NOT evicted
Existing parser tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add WASM load error reporting in initParser
userStories.description: As a developer debugging a broken install, I want to see which WASM paths were tried and why each failed.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/parser.ts initParser(), collect errors in an array during the candidate loop instead of swallowing them
If all candidates fail, throw an error listing all attempted paths and their error messages
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix getReferencesTo including declaration as first element
userStories.description: As a developer, I want getReferencesTo to return only actual references, not include the declaration itself via unshift.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/symbolTable.ts getReferencesTo(), remove the results.unshift(decl.range) line
Search all callers in server/src/server.ts and update any that assumed the first element was the declaration
Existing reference tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Remove unreachable duplicate case in autodocRenderer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want no unreachable code in the autodoc renderer.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/autodocRenderer.ts renderBlocks(), find and remove the duplicate case 'group' handler (the second one is unreachable)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace diagnosticManager SHA-256 with fast hash
userStories.description: As a developer, I want content hashing for cache invalidation to use a fast non-crypto hash instead of SHA-256.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/diagnosticManager.ts computeContentHash(), replace SHA-256 crypto hash with a simple DJB2 or FNV-1a hash
Remove the crypto import if no longer needed
Guard pd.line - 1 conversion in mergeDiagnostics against pd.line <= 0 (clamp to 0)
Existing diagnostic tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix persistentCache ESM/CJS require mismatch
userStories.description: As a developer, I want persistentCache to use ESM imports instead of require() which fails in strict ESM.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/persistentCache.ts, replace require('node:fs') with a top-level import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
Existing cache tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix AGENTS.md and architecture.md directory names and lint script
userStories.description: As a developer, I want docs to reference the correct directory name (client/ not extension/) and not list a nonexistent lint command.
acceptanceCriteria: In AGENTS.md, change 'extension/' to 'client/' in the Project Structure section
In AGENTS.md Build & Run section, remove the 'bun run lint' line or add a lint script to package.json
In docs/architecture.md, change any 'extension/' references to 'client/'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix docs ci.md, existing-tooling.md, state-of-project.md inaccuracies
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ci.md to reference Bun not npm, existing-tooling.md to acknowledge tree-sitter-pike exists, and state-of-project.md to have correct counts.
acceptanceCriteria: In docs/ci.md, replace npm ci and setup-node references with Bun equivalents
In docs/existing-tooling.md, add a note that tree-sitter-pike now exists and the 'no grammar' finding is historical
In docs/state-of-project.md, update test count to 1588 and corpus count to 66
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix decisions 0002, 0003, 0010 inaccurate claims
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ADRs to reflect what was actually implemented, not what was originally planned.
acceptanceCriteria: In decisions/0002-tier-3-scope.md, update 'out of scope' items for rename and code actions to note they were implemented in later phases
In decisions/0010-cross-file-resolution.md, remove the 'resolve.pike NOT IMPLEMENTED' note since it now exists
In decisions/0003-pike-ai-kb-integration.md, add a note that PikeOracle MCP was superseded by PikeWorker subprocess (decision 0011)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Remove mock from hover tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want hover tests to not monkey-patch worker.typeof_. This violates the no-mock rule.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/lsp/hover.test.ts, find the typeof_ monkey-patch (worker.typeof_ = async (...) => ...)
Replace with either: real Pike invocation gated on pikeAvailable, or pre-recorded JSON fixtures
Wrap typeof tests in describe.skipIf(!pikeAvailable) if using real Pike
No monkey-patching of server internals remains
All hover tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Harden vacuous assertions in references.test.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want reference tests to fail when the behavior is wrong, not pass silently via if (result) { expect... }.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/lsp/references.test.ts, find all if (result) or if (refs) conditional assertion patterns
Replace each with expect(result).toBeDefined() then unconditional expect on result properties, or assert(result) before assertions
Test count does not change — same tests, stronger assertions
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Harden vacuous assertions in edge-cases.test.ts and definition.test.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want edge-case and definition tests to fail when behavior is wrong, not pass silently.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/lsp/edge-cases.test.ts, find conditional assertion patterns and replace with unconditional assertions
In tests/lsp/definition.test.ts, find conditional assertion patterns and replace with unconditional assertions
Test count does not change
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Delete empty integration test stubs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want no empty test files. Three integration stubs export nothing.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete tests/integration/activation.test.ts
Delete tests/integration/documentSymbol.test.ts
Delete tests/integration/error-recovery.test.ts
Delete tests/integration/crossFilePropagation.test.ts (also empty)
Full test suite runs with 0 fail
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement lifecycle exit-after-shutdown test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the skipped lifecycle test to exist and pass.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/lsp/lifecycle.test.ts, convert test.todo('exit after shutdown does not throw') to a real test
Test: send shutdown request via client.sendRequest('shutdown'), verify response, verify no error thrown
All lifecycle tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add semantic correctness checks to real-codebase-verification tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want smoke tests to verify actual content, not just that nothing crashed.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/lsp/real-codebase-verification.test.ts, add assertions that check specific symbol names are present in documentSymbol results (not just toBeDefined)
Add at least 5 corpus files that verify a specific expected symbol name appears
Existing crash-test behavior is preserved — only stronger assertions added
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Split symbolTable.ts scope construction into scopeBuilder.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want symbolTable.ts under 500 lines. First extraction: scope building logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/src/features/scopeBuilder.ts with scope construction functions extracted from symbolTable.ts
Update imports in symbolTable.ts and all consumers
symbolTable.ts reduced by the extracted lines
All existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Split symbolTable.ts declaration and reference collection into separate files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want symbolTable.ts under 500 lines. Second extraction: declaration and reference collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract declaration collection into server/src/features/declarationCollector.ts
Extract reference collection into server/src/features/referenceCollector.ts
symbolTable.ts should be <= 500 lines after all extractions (US-032 + this story)
All existing tests pass with updated imports
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Split server.ts handler logic into separate modules
userStories.description: As a developer, I want server.ts under 500 lines by extracting handler logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract hover handler logic into server/src/features/hoverHandler.ts
Extract definition/references handlers into server/src/features/navigationHandler.ts
server.ts keeps only createPikeServer wiring and lifecycle
server.ts <= 500 lines
All existing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Split completion.ts trigger detection into completionTrigger.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want completion.ts under 500 lines by extracting detectTriggerContext.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract detectTriggerContext (~200 lines) from server/src/features/completion.ts into server/src/features/completionTrigger.ts
completion.ts <= 500 lines
All existing completion tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Split autodocRenderer.ts XML parser into xmlParser.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want autodocRenderer.ts under 500 lines by extracting the XML parser.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract parseXml and related utilities from server/src/features/autodocRenderer.ts into server/src/features/xmlParser.ts
autodocRenderer.ts <= 500 lines
All existing autodoc tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add CancellationToken propagation to PikeWorker
userStories.description: As a developer, I want cancellation requests to skip Pike subprocess work instead of running stale operations.
acceptanceCriteria: In server/src/features/pikeWorker.ts, add optional CancellationToken parameter to enqueue()
Before writing to stdin in drainQueue, check if token.isCancellationRequested — if so, resolve with empty result
Update server.ts callers to pass CancellationToken to worker.enqueue when available
Existing worker tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add textDocument/implementation handler
userStories.description: As a Pike developer, I want to find all classes that inherit from a given class, so I can navigate inheritance hierarchies.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/src/features/implementation.ts with findImplementations function using WorkspaceIndex reverse dependency graph
Register textDocument/implementation handler in server.ts
Register implementationProvider capability in initialize response
Add 3+ tests: class with implementers, class with no implementers, cross-file implementation
Typecheck passes
